resources.string: Paste a vless://, hysteria2://, vpn:// URL, or a full config
Point the camera at the QR code with your share link
No saved servers yet. Import a config to get started.
Match the system Material You palette
Start the tunnel automatically after reboot
Choose which apps route through the VPN
All apps route through the tunnel.
Only the selected apps route through the tunnel.
The selected apps bypass the tunnel.
Russian IPs and domains always connect directly, not through the tunnel. Data refreshes every 12 hours.
What PaykeyfearVPN does with your data

PaykeyfearVPN runs entirely on your device. Connection configurations you import are stored locally in an encrypted app database and are never transmitted to us or any third party.

We do not operate VPN servers. Your traffic is routed to whichever server is described by the configuration you provide. The choice of server, its jurisdiction, and its logging practices are the responsibility of the server operator.

The app does not collect analytics, crash reports, or advertising identifiers. The Android system may display connection statistics (bytes sent/received) locally; these numbers are not recorded anywhere outside the app.

The QUERY_ALL_PACKAGES permission is used only to present the list of installed apps when you configure the split-tunnel feature. No list of installed apps leaves your device.
PaykeyfearVPN is GPL-3.0-or-later. Bundles amneziawg-go (GPL-3.0), Xray-core (MPL-2.0), tun2socks (MIT), and hysteria (MIT). See LICENSE in the source repo for full notices.
